name: caffeine l-theanine
summary: caffeine l-theanine is tracked for Adenosine antagonism; GABA/glutamate modulation; Combines adenosine antagonism with glutamatergic modulation improving with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human.
description: caffeine l-theanine is tracked for Adenosine antagonism; GABA/glutamate modulation; Combines adenosine antagonism with glutamatergic modulation improving with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human.
safetyNotes: Caffeine sensitivity, anxiety, insomnia, pregnancy, blood pressure, stimulant stacking caveats needed.

claimMap.claim: Theanine plus caffeine may support acute attention and mood outcomes, but uncertainty remains and dosing/tea-equivalence should be explicit.
claimMap.notes: Theanine plus caffeine may support acute attention and mood outcomes, but uncertainty remains and dosing/tea-equivalence should be explicit.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Theanine plus caffeine; tea/bioactive doses varied

claimMap.claim: v8.2: Caffeine plus L-theanine has acute evidence for attention-related outcomes.
claimMap.notes: v8.2: Caffeine plus L-theanine has acute evidence for attention-related outcomes.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: caffeine 50–150 mg plus L-theanine 100–200 mg acute
